---
name: Technical audit issue
about: Report one reproducible technical consistency concern using neutral language
title: "[Technical audit]: "
labels: technical-audit
assignees: ""
---

## Scope check

- [ ] This issue reports one specific technical point.
- [ ] The issue is based on locatable data, calculations, or claims.
- [ ] The wording does not infer author intent or allege misconduct.
- [ ] No copyrighted PDF or proprietary data file is uploaded.

## Location

Identify the exact location, such as page, figure, table, equation, line, Supplementary Information section, or source-data file.

```text
Location:
```

## Observation

State the reported value, trend, claim, or inconsistency as neutrally as possible.

```text
Observation:
```

## Check or recalculation

Show the equation, command, input values, or manual cross-check used to reproduce the concern.

```bash
# command or calculation, if applicable
```

## Why it matters technically

Explain how this affects data consistency, reproducibility, physical self-consistency, or evidence-claim alignment.

```text
Technical significance:
```

## Evidence level

Choose one:

- [ ] L1 — direct numerical inconsistency
- [ ] L2 — recalculation discrepancy
- [ ] L3 — dimensional or physical-unit issue
- [ ] L4 — evidence-claim overextension
- [ ] L5 — hypothesis or concern requiring additional data

## Requested clarification

Phrase the request as a clarification, not an allegation.

```text
Could the authors clarify ...
```
